gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings and approved the PR evidence sidecar key guard slice.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Rejected unsupported top-level keys in PR evidence sidecars during bundle validation
why: Keep V1 release bundles schema-tight so ad hoc review notes or debug payloads cannot enter the audited release handoff.
